arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: اقْتَرَبَتِ السَّاعَةُ وَانشَقَّ الْقَمَرُ
english translation text:
The Hour has drawn near and the moon is split.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَإِن يَرَوْا آيَةً يُعْرِضُوا وَيَقُولُوا سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
english translation text:
If they see a sign, they turn away, and say, ‘An incessant magic!’
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَكَذَّبُوا وَاتَّبَعُوا أَهْوَاءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
english translation text:
They denied and followed their own desires, and every matter has a setting [appropriate to it].
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ جَاءَهُم مِّنَ الْأَنبَاءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
english translation text:
There have already come to them reports containing admonishment,
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: حِكْمَةٌ بَالِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ النُّذُرُ
english translation text:
[and representing] far-reaching wisdom; but warnings are of no avail!
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ الدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَيْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
english translation text:
So turn away from them! The day when the Caller calls to a dire thing,
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَارُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ الْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
english translation text:
they will emerge from the graves as if they were scattered locusts with a humbled look [in their eyes],
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى الدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ الْكَافِرُونَ هَٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
english translation text:
scrambling toward the summoner. The faithless will say, ‘This is a hard day!’
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا مَجْنُونٌ وَازْدُجِرَ
english translation text:
The people of Noah impugned before them. So they impugned Our servant and said, ‘A crazy man,’ and he was reviled.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُ أَنِّي مَغْلُوبٌ فَانتَصِرْ
english translation text:
Thereat he invoked his Lord, [saying,] ‘I have been overcome, so help [me].’
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: فَفَتَحْنَا أَبْوَابَ السَّمَاءِ بِمَاءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
english translation text:
Then We opened the gates of the sky with pouring waters,
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَفَجَّرْنَا الْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَالْتَقَى الْمَاءُ عَلَىٰ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
english translation text:
and We made the earth burst forth with springs, and the waters met for a preordained purpose.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَحَمَلْنَاهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَاحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
english translation text:
We bore him on a vessel made of planks and nails,
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: تَجْرِي بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَاءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
english translation text:
which sailed [over the flood waters] in Our sight, as a retribution for him who was met with disbelief.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَاهَا آيَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
english translation text:
Certainly We have left it as a sign; so is there anyone who will be admonished?
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
english translation text:
So how were My punishment and warnings?
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا الْقُرْآنَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
english translation text:
Certainly We have made the Quran simple for the sake of admonishment. So is there anyone who will be admonished?
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
english translation text:
[The people of] ‘Ad impugned [their apostle]. So how were My punishment and warnings?
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِي يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
english translation text:
Indeed We unleashed upon them an icy gale on an incessantly ill-fated day,
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: تَنزِعُ النَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
english translation text:
knocking down people as if they were trunks of uprooted palm trees.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
english translation text:
So how were My punishment and warnings?!
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا الْقُرْآنَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
english translation text:
Certainly We have made the Quran simple for the sake of admonishment. So is there anyone who will be admonished?
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِالنُّذُرِ
english translation text:
[The people of] Thamud denied the warnings,
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: فَقَالُوا أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَاحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُ إِنَّا إِذًا لَّفِي ضَلَالٍ وَسُعُرٍ
english translation text:
and they said, ‘Are we to follow a lone human from ourselves?! Indeed then we would be in error and madness.’
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: أَأُلْقِيَ الذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِن بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
english translation text:
‘Has the Reminder been cast upon him from among us? No, he is a self-conceited liar.’
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ الْكَذَّابُ الْأَشِرُ
english translation text:
‘Tomorrow they will know who is a self-conceited liar.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُو النَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَارْتَقِبْهُمْ وَاصْطَبِرْ
english translation text:
We are sending the She-camel as a trial for them; so watch them and be steadfast.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ الْمَاءَ قِسْمَةٌ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
english translation text:
Inform them that the water is to be shared between them; each of them showing up at his turn.’
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: فَنَادَوْا صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
english translation text:
But they called their companion, and he took [a knife] and hamstrung [her].
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
english translation text:
So how were My punishment and My warnings?!
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً فَكَانُوا كَهَشِيمِ الْمُحْتَظِرِ
english translation text:
We sent against them a single Cry, and they became like the dry sticks of a corral builder.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا الْقُرْآنَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
english translation text:
Certainly We have made the Quran simple for the sake of admonishment. So is there anyone who will be admonished?
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍ بِالنُّذُرِ
english translation text:
And the people of Lot denied the warnings.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّا آلَ لُوطٍ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَاهُم بِسَحَرٍ
english translation text:
We unleashed upon them a rain of stones, excepting the family of Lot, whom We delivered at dawn
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِي مَن شَكَرَ
english translation text:
as a blessing from Us. Thus do We reward those who give thanks.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا بِالنُّذُرِ
english translation text:
He had already warned them of Our punishment, but they disputed the warnings.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ رَاوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِ فَطَمَسْنَا أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
english translation text:
They even solicited of him his guests, whereat We blotted out their eyes, [saying,] ‘Taste My punishment and My warnings!’
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
english translation text:
Early at dawn there visited them an abiding punishment:
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: فَذُوقُوا عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
english translation text:
‘Taste My punishment and warnings!’
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا الْقُرْآنَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
english translation text:
Certainly We have made the Quran simple for the sake of admonishment. So is there anyone who will be admonished?
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ جَاءَ آلَ فِرْعَوْنَ النُّذُرُ
english translation text:
Certainly the warnings did come to Pharaoh’s clan
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: كَذَّبُوا بِآيَاتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَاهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
english translation text:
who denied all of Our signs. So We seized them with the seizing of One [who is] all-mighty, Omnipotent.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُولَٰئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَاءَةٌ فِي الزُّبُرِ
english translation text:
Are your faithless better than those? Have you [been granted] [some sort of] immunity in the scriptures?
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
english translation text:
Do they say, ‘We are a confederate league’?
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: سَيُهْزَمُ الْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ الدُّبُرَ
english translation text:
The league will be routed and turn its back [to flee].
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: بَلِ السَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَالسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
english translation text:
Indeed, the Hour is their tryst; and the Hour will be most calamitous and bitter.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: إِنَّ الْمُجْرِمِينَ فِي ضَلَالٍ وَسُعُرٍ
english translation text:
Indeed the guilty are steeped in error and madness.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِي النَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا مَسَّ سَقَرَ
english translation text:
The day when they are dragged on their faces into the Fire, [it will be said to them,] ‘Taste the touch of hell!’
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَيْءٍ خَلَقْنَاهُ بِقَدَرٍ
english translation text:
Indeed We have created everything in a measure,
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَمَا أَمْرُنَا إِلَّا وَاحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍ بِالْبَصَرِ
english translation text:
and Our command is but a single [word], like the twinkling of an eye.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَا أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
english translation text:
Certainly We have destroyed your likes. So is there anyone who will be admonished?
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَكُلُّ شَيْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِي الزُّبُرِ
english translation text:
Everything they have done is in the books,
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
english translation text:
and everything big and small is committed to writing.
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: إِنَّ الْمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّاتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
english translation text:
Indeed the Godwary will be amid gardens and streams,
Al Qamar – The Moon

arabic text: فِي مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
english translation text:
in the abode of truthfulness with an omnipotent King.
Al Qamar – The Moon
